actionUnits.condition: Temple (fileID 259640721) currently shows only a Transform component (id 259640722) in the provided scene meta. Please provide the attached scripts/MonoBehaviours (including m_Calls) and/or the components of its children (Transform.m_Children: [1851615020, 2072930448, 1846402873, 595963425, 594625910] or the IDs you listed: [1851615019, 2072930447, 1602679148 stripped, 791898212]) so we can select a concrete event to trigger.

Invoke Door.Open while locked to cover the fail path (plays open_fail_sound). MonoBehaviour (id: 1602679153) with m_Script guid: 39f8a5a2b11c2426cb2a2bea3e825751 matches script Door (public AudioClip open_fail_sound/open_success_sound). Attached to prefab instance (m_PrefabInstance: 1781955274) under Temple. Prefab has a BoxCollider (size modified in prefab) so Trigger is allowed.
Unlock the Door to allow successful opening. MonoBehaviour (id: 1602679153) Door.Unlock has no parameters.
Open the Door after unlocking to cover success path and Opening->Opened Update branch (slides +7.0 units at 2.0 u/s). Expect open_success_sound and state transition to Opened.
Close the Door from Opened state to cover Closing Update branch (slides back toward initial position) and success sound path.

Crystal MonoBehaviour (id: 791898217) uses script guid 7ec1f4a241dbe3243aed64a4afbc8b66, which matches the provided Crystal script. EventTrigger (id: 791898216) has m_Calls mapping PointerClick (eventID:4) to Crystal.Touch on the same MonoBehaviour. Start() disables MeshCollider (id: 791898213), so call MakeClickable() to enable interactions.
Manually invoke Touch() (also targeted by EventTrigger m_Calls) to cover greeting audio playback, _hide_dialog=false, and _touched=true branches. This maps to MonoBehaviour id 791898217 (Crystal).

Invoke TakeCoins() to drive either the success branch (no GameObjects tagged 'Coin' -> dialog_teleport active) or the fail branch (>=1 'Coin' -> dialog_fail active). Requires scene knowledge to cover both outcomes.
Invoke Teleport() to cover teleport sound playback and _teleporting=true. Update() will vibrate during playback and then activate dialog_end after audio finishes.
Invoke Restart() to cover SceneManager.LoadScene(0) path. Execute last to avoid disrupting prior validations.
